sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name LowCardinality(String), value Nullable(Int64));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, toLowCardinality('test'), NULL);
SELECT id, toTypeName(name) AS name_type, CAST(value AS Int32) AS value_casted FROM test_table;
UPDATE test_table SET value = CAST(name AS Int64) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, toTypeName(CAST(value AS String)) AS value_string FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
